questions: The *PCPNDT* Act of 1994 prohibits sex determination for the purpose of sex-selective abortion in India.
NIPT detects cell-free fetal *DNA/cffDNA* in maternal blood and has a sensitivity of *99* percent for trisomy 21.
Amniocentesis is typically performed at *15–18/15-18* weeks, while CVS can be done earlier at *10–12/10-12* weeks of gestation.
In Down syndrome screening, serum AFP is *decreased/low* and hCG is *increased/elevated:opposite direction to AFP*.
